HEPB_CHR_COMBINED Hepatitis B (Chronic) - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering both Medicare and Medicaid data, for having Chronic Hepatits B Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
null/missing
